author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر أحمد بن علي بن سعيد بن إبراهيم الأموي المروزي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith scholar and jurist known for his contributions to early Islamic jurisprudence and hadith compilation.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Early collection focusing on the Friday prayer (Jumu'ah) and its virtues, contributing to the broader hadith literature on Islamic rituals.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the early works dedicated to the topic of Jumu'ah, providing insights into the practices and virtues of the Friday prayer in early Islamic communities.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: سمير بن أمين الزهيري is known for his careful and methodical approach to hadith text editing and verification.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The editor likely relied on multiple manuscript sources and cross-referenced with other hadith collections to ensure textual accuracy.
